test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: no active user session. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - email: testuser@example.com - neighborhood: testneighborhood - photo: testphoto.jpg - companyname: testcompany - companydescription: testdescription test steps: 1. navigate to the user creation page. 2. enter username, password, email, neighborhood, photo, company name, and company description. 3. click on the "create user" button. 4. system checks if the user already exists. 5. if the user does not exist, system creates a new user. 6. system authenticates the user. 7. if credentials are valid, user is redirected to the home page. 8. if credentials are invalid, user is prompted to re-enter credentials. expected result: - user is created and authenticated successfully, and redirected to the home page.

test case id: tc-search-005 title: viewing promotions module: search source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in and a business profile exists. test data: - business profile: testbusiness test steps: 1. user clicks on the business profile. 2. user clicks on the "view promotions" button. 3. system displays the promotions. expected result: - promotions are displayed for the business profile.

test case id: tc-user-004 title: user navigation through home page module: user source pages: 2,3 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - user clicks on different icons on the home page. test steps: 1. user clicks on the profile photo. 2. system navigates to the user profile. 3. user clicks on the notification icon. 4. system navigates to the notification section. 5. user interacts with the map. 6. system navigates to the full screen map. 7. user clicks on the menu icon. 8. system navigates to the menu interaction. 9. user clicks on the home icon. 10. system navigates back to the home page. 11. user clicks on the personal profile icon. 12. system navigates to the user profile. 13. user clicks on the chat icon. 14. system navigates to the chat section. 15. user clicks on the general access icon. 16. system navigates to the general dashboard. expected result: - user is navigated to the correct sections based on the icon clicks.

test case id: tc-user-002 title: user creation failure (duplicate user) module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: no active user session. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - email: testuser@example.com - neighborhood: testneighborhood - photo: testphoto.jpg - companyname: testcompany - companydescription: testdescription test steps: 1. navigate to the user creation page. 2. enter username, password, email, neighborhood, photo, company name, and company description. 3. click on the "create user" button. 4. system checks if the user already exists. 5. if the user already exists, system displays an error message. expected result: - error message displayed indicating that the user already exists.

test case id: tc-post-002 title: posting a new post with invalid content module: post source pages: 3,4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - post content: "" - neighborhood: testneighborhood test steps: 1. user clicks on the post button. 2. user enters empty post content and selects the neighborhood. 3. user clicks on the "post" button. 4. system checks if the post content is valid. 5. if the post content is invalid, system displays an error message. expected result: - error message displayed indicating that the post content is invalid.

test case id: tc-database-006 title: database write operation with invalid post content module: database source pages: 6 preconditions: user is logged in and a post exists. test data: - post content: "invalid post content" - neighborhood: testneighborhood test steps: 1. user clicks on the post to view it. 2. user clicks on the comment button. 3. user enters invalid post content. 4. user clicks on the "leave comment" button. 5. system checks if the post content is valid. 6. if the post content is invalid, system displays an error message. expected result: - error message displayed indicating that the post content is invalid.

test case id: tc-search-006 title: booking an appointment module: search source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in and a business profile exists. test data: - business profile: testbusiness test steps: 1. user clicks on the business profile. 2. user clicks on the "book appointment" button. 3. system opens the calendar. 4. user selects a date and time. 5. system confirms the appointment. expected result: - appointment is booked and confirmed.

test case id: tc-search-003 title: adding a contact module: search source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in and a profile exists. test data: - profile: resident or business test steps: 1. user clicks on the profile. 2. user clicks on the "add to contacts" button. 3. system adds the profile to the user's contact list. expected result: - profile is added to the user's contact list.

test case id: tc-user-003 title: user authentication failure (invalid credentials) module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: no active user session. test data: - username: testuser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. navigate to the login page. 2. enter username and password. 3. click on the "login" button. 4. system checks if the credentials are valid. 5. if credentials are invalid, system displays an error message. expected result: - error message displayed indicating that the credentials are invalid.
